repair_history.diagnosis:
Element of the same name ('dps') in AGREE Annex in 'door_handler': AGREE annex references port name 'dps' that shadows component type port with same name -> Rename 'dps' to 'dps_val' in AGREE annex guarantee
Feature of the same name ('dps') in component type: AGREE annex references port name 'dps' that shadows component type port with same name -> Rename 'dps' to 'dps_val' in AGREE annex guarantee
extraneous input '(' expecting RULE_ID: Invalid syntax due to ambiguous port name reference in AGREE expression -> Rename 'dps' to 'dps_val' in AGREE annex guarantee
mismatched input '>' expecting ':': Invalid syntax due to ambiguous port name reference in AGREE expression -> Rename 'dps' to 'dps_val' in AGREE annex guarantee
no viable alternative at input 'eq': Invalid syntax due to ambiguous port name reference in AGREE expression -> Rename 'dps' to 'dps_val' in AGREE annex guarantee
extraneous input '(' expecting RULE_ID: AGREE syntax error due to invalid expression structure -> Replace 'dps_val' with 'dps' to reference the visible port

extraneous input '(' expecting RULE_ID: AGREE parser misinterprets dps > 0 as type membership expression -> Rewrite (dps > 0) as a valid AGREE expression using visible symbols only
mismatched input '>' expecting ':': Invalid syntax in AGREE expression due to type membership interpretation -> Replace the invalid comparison with a legal AGREE expression
no viable alternative at input 'eq': AGREE syntax error from malformed expression -> Correct the expression to use valid AGREE syntax

Element of the same name ('dps') in AGREE Annex in 'door_handler': Name conflict between AGREE annex variable and component feature -> Rename the AGREE variable 'dps' to 'dps_val' to avoid conflict with component feature
Feature of the same name ('dps') in component type: Name conflict between AGREE annex variable and component feature -> Rename the AGREE variable 'dps' to 'dps_val' to avoid conflict with component feature
extraneous input '(' expecting RULE_ID: Invalid syntax due to name conflict causing parsing error -> Rename the AGREE variable 'dps' to 'dps_val' to fix parsing error
mismatched input '>' expecting ':': Invalid syntax due to name conflict causing parsing error -> Rename the AGREE variable 'dps' to 'dps_val' to fix parsing error
no viable alternative at input 'eq': Invalid syntax due to name conflict causing parsing error -> Rename the AGREE variable 'dps' to 'dps_val' to fix parsing error

extraneous input '(' expecting RULE_ID: Invalid AGREE syntax: use of parentheses around boolean expression -> Remove parentheses around (dps_val > 0)
mismatched input '>' expecting ':': Invalid AGREE syntax: use of '>' instead of 'eq' for boolean comparison -> Replace '>' with 'eq' for boolean equality
no viable alternative at input 'eq': Invalid AGREE syntax: incorrect use of 'eq' with parentheses -> Remove parentheses around (dps_val > 0)
